rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE JOSEPH & PAULINE AQUILINA 2004 LIVING TRUST U/D/T 5/8/04
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss Petition To Determine Validity Of Purported Trust Amendment And For Order Determining Interest In Property, Supporting Declaration Of Robert J. Sheppard, And Supporting Memorandum
rulings.Rulings: Respondents' Motion to Dismiss Petition to Determine Validity of Purported Trust Amendment is granted. Parties failed to address the Order Determining Interest in Property. The motion as it relates to the Order Determining Interest in Property is denied without prejudice. Any party who disagrees with the tentative and requests argument must notify the court (415-551-3702) and all parties or counsel no later than 5:00 p.m. on November 19, 2013.
